content: In 2024-2025 cutting-edge active learning agent memory systems, the gradient of curiosity signal that prunes and prioritizes new episodic memory traces acts identically to the evolutionary fitness filter that sorts which traits an autonomous general agent retains for long-term adaptation. This means that curiosity-driven memory compression in SOTA active learning agents can be re-framed as a real-time on-board evolutionary process for an agent's cognitive 'genome' of remembered experiences.
